mapper.sql: select r.reserve_id, r.user_id, r.lab_id, r.start_date, r.end_date, r.audit_status, r.remark, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, l.lab_name, l.building, l.equipment, u.nick_name as user_name from sys_reservation r left join sys_lab l on r.lab_id = l.lab_id left join sys_user u on r.user_id = u.user_id
mapper.select:
select distinct l.lab_id, l.lab_name, l.building, l.capacity, l.status, l.equipment from sys_lab l where l.status = 0
AND l.lab_name like concat('%', #{labName}, '%')
AND l.building = #{building}
AND l.equipment like concat('%', #{equipment}, '%')
order by l.lab_id
select reserve_id, start_date, end_date, audit_status from sys_reservation where lab_id = #{labId} and DATE(start_date) = DATE(#{date}) and audit_status IN (0, 1) order by start_date
mapper.insert: insert into sys_reservation ( user_id, lab_id, start_date, end_date, audit_status, remark, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{userId}, #{labId}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, 0, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.select: where r.user_id = #{userId} order by r.create_time desc
mapper.update:
update sys_reservation
audit_status = #{auditStatus}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate()
where reserve_id = #{reserveId} and audit_status = 0
mapper.select: select count(*) from sys_reservation where lab_id = #{labId} and audit_status IN (0, 1)
select count(*) from sys_reservation where audit_status = 0
select count(*) from sys_reservation where user_id = #{userId}
select count(*) from sys_reservation where DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
